description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden boat with a single mast and rigging, featuring a flat deck and a central cabin structure made of metal. The hull is constructed from planks of wood, giving it a natural brown appearance, while the cabin is boxy and metallic with round porthole windows and a visible door. The deck is open at the stern, with a simple railing and a raised platform, and the bow is pointed, enhancing its streamlined look. The mast is tall and centrally positioned, with ropes extending to the bow and stern, suggesting it is designed for sailing. Several exhaust pipes and vents are visible on the cabin roof, indicating possible auxiliary engine power or ventilation. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for both leisure and work in urban waterways or marinas.
description: A wooden sailboat with a central metal cabin, single mast, and open deck, featuring porthole windows and functional rigging. The design is practical and robust, with a pointed bow and open stern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden hull, central metal cabin with portholes, and the tall mast with rigging.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, mast, and the cabin roof with visible vents and portholes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cabin door, additional portholes, and the open stern area with railing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open stern deck, railing, and the back of the metal cabin with two roof vents.
